Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Lovelace, R., Morgan, M., Hama, L., Padgham, M., 2019. stats19: A package for working with open road crash data. Journal of Open Source Software. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181

@Article{,
  author = {Robin Lovelace and Malcolm Morgan and Layik Hama and Mark Padgham and David Ranzolin and Adam Sparks},
  title = {stats 19: A package for working with open road crash data},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.01181},
  year = {2019},
  month = {jan},
  publisher = {The Open Journal},
  volume = {4},
  number = {33},
  pages = {1181},
  journal = {The Journal of Open Source Software},
}

Authors

  • David Ranzolin. Reviewer.
